findings.summary: 4 subagents blocked by memory pressure hook. Adapted to direct search but could have checked process count first.
findings.evidence: All 4 Agent calls returned MEMORY PRESSURE error
findings.proposed_fix: Check pgrep -c claude before dispatching parallel agents in resource-constrained sessions

findings.summary: Search burst hook blocked 8 consecutive queries. Agent-to-direct-search fallback creates burst pattern when subagent delegation is blocked.
findings.evidence: Hook messages: 8-14 consecutive search queries without reading results
findings.proposed_fix: Batch <=5 queries, read results, then batch next <=5 when doing inline research.

findings.summary: Research memo proposed 4 fixes, 3 already existed in codebase (PRS CIs, gnomAD penetrance, non-coding AF filter). Should have grepped before writing recommendations.
findings.evidence: grep found prs_prediction_intervals.py, gnomad_penetrance.py, AF filter all existing
findings.proposed_fix: Inventory-before-proposing: grep codebase for existing mitigations BEFORE writing what-to-do sections in research memos

findings.summary: Large Exa result files (157K-759K chars) mostly noise from broad queries. Consumer marketing and LinkedIn posts dominated.
findings.proposed_fix: Use contextMaxCharacters: 3000 + enableSummary on broad Exa sweeps
